# Proverbs 18

## Verses (24)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | He who keeps himself separate for his private purpose goes against all good sense. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | A foolish man has no pleasure in good sense, but only to let what is in his heart come to light. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | When the evil-doer comes, a low opinion comes with him, and with the loss of honour comes shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | The words of a man's mouth are like deep waters: the fountain of wisdom is like a flowing stream. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | To have respect for the person of the evil-doer is not good, or to give a wrong decision against the upright. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | A foolish man's lips are a cause of fighting, and his mouth makes him open to blows. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | The mouth of a foolish man is his destruction, and his lips are a net for his soul. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | The words of one who says evil of his neighbour secretly are like sweet food, and go down into the inner parts of the stomach. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | He who does not give his mind to his work is brother to him who makes destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | The name of the Lord is a strong tower: the upright man running into it is safe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | The property of a man of wealth is his strong town, and it is as a high wall in the thoughts of his heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Before destruction the heart of man is full of pride, and before honour goes a gentle spirit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | To give an answer before hearing is a foolish thing and a cause of shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | The spirit of a man will be his support when he is ill; but how may a broken spirit be lifted up? | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | The heart of the man of good sense gets knowledge; the ear of the wise is searching for knowledge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | A man's offering makes room for him, letting him come before great men. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | The man who first puts his cause before the judge seems to be in the right; but then his neighbour comes and puts his cause in its true light. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | The decision of chance puts an end to argument, parting the strong. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | A brother wounded is like a strong town, and violent acts are like a locked tower. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | With the fruit of a man's mouth his stomach will be full; the produce of his lips will be his in full measure. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | Death and life are in the power of the tongue; and those to whom it is dear will have its fruit for their food. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Whoever gets a wife gets a good thing, and has the approval of the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | The poor man makes requests for grace, but the man of wealth gives a rough answer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | There are friends who may be a man's destruction, but there is a lover who keeps nearer than a brother. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |

<!-- END AUTO-INDEX -->
